docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.01 FILED BY LUCHETT, DIANE AS TO DEFENDANT COLLINS, SHARNICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
